english translation text: Dua Sabah
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ دَلَعَ لِسَانَ ٱلصَّبَاحِ بِنُطْقِ تَبَلُّجِهِ
english translation text: O Allah, O He Who extended the morning's tongue in the speech of its dawning,

arabic text: وَسَرَّحَ قِطَعَ ٱللَّيْلِ ٱلْمُظْلِمِ بِغَيَاهِبِ تَلَجْلُجِهِ
english translation text: dispatched the fragments of the dark night into the gloom of its stammering,

arabic text: وَأَتْقَنَ صُنْعَ ٱلْفَلَكِ الدَّوَّارِ فِي مَقَادِيرِ تَبَرُّجِهِ
english translation text: made firm the structure of the turning spheres in the measure of its display,
and beamed forth the brightness of the sun through the light of its blazing!

arabic text: يَا مَنْ دَلَّ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِهِ بِذَاتِهِ
english translation text: O He Who demonstrates His Essence by His Essence,
transcends from congeniality with His creatures,
and is exalted beyond conformity with His qualities!

arabic text: يَا مَنْ قَرُبَ مِنْ خَطَرَاتِ ٱلظُّنُونِ
english translation text: O He Who is near to the passing thoughts of opinions,
far from the regards of eyes,

arabic text: وَعَلِمَ بِمَا كَانَ قَبْلَ أَن يَكُونَ
english translation text: and knows what will be before it comes to be!

arabic text: يَا مَنْ أَرْقَدَنِي فِي مِهَادِ أَمْنِهِ وَأَمَانِهِ
english translation text: O He Who has put me at ease in the cradle of His security and sanctuary,

arabic text: وَأَيْقَظَنِي إِلَىٰ مَا مَنَحَنِي بِهِ مِنْ مِنَنِهِ وَإِحْسَانِهِ
english translation text: awakened me to the favors and kindness that He has bestowed upon me,

arabic text: وَكَفَّ أَكُفَّ السُّوءِ عَنِّي بِيَدِهِ وَسُلْطَانِهِ
english translation text: and held back from me the claws of evil with His hand and His authority!

arabic text: صَلِّ اللَّهُمَّ عَلَىٰ ٱلدَّلِيلِ إِلَيْكَ فِي ٱللَّيْلِ ٱلأَلْيَلِ
english translation text: Bless, O Allah, the guide to You in the darkest night,

arabic text: وَٱلْمَاسِكِ مِنْ أَسْبَابِكَ بِحَبْلِ ٱلشَّرَفِ ٱلأَطْوَلِ
english translation text: who, of Your ropes, clings to the cord of the longest nobility,

arabic text: وَٱلنَّاصِعِ ٱلْحَسَبِ فِي ذِرْوَةِ ٱلْكَاهِلِ ٱلأَعْبَلِ
english translation text: whose pure lineage evident at the summit of stout shoulders,

arabic text: وَٱلثَّابِتِ ٱلْقَدَمِ عَلَىٰ زَحَاِليْفِهَا فِي ٱلزَّمَنِ ٱلأَوَّلِ
english translation text: and whose feet were entrenched in spite of slippery places in ancient time.
And [bless] his household, the good, chosen, and pious.
Open for us, O Allah, the leaves of the morning's door
with the keys of mercy and prosperity!

arabic text: وَأَلْبِسْنِي ٱللَّهُمَّ مِنْ أَفْضَلِ خِلَعِ ٱلْهِدَايَةِ وَٱلصَّلاَحِ
english translation text: Clothe me, O Allah, with the most excellent robes of guidance and righteousness!

arabic text: وَٱغْرِسِ اللَّهُمَّ بِعَظَمَتِكَ فِي شِرْبِ جَنَانِي يَنَابِيعَ ٱلْخُشُوعِ
english translation text: Plant, O Allah, through Your tremendousness, the springs of humility in the watering place of my heart!

arabic text: وَأَجْرِ ٱللَّهُمَّ لِهَيْبَتِكَ مِنْ آمَاقِي زَفَرَاتِ ٱلدُّمُوعِ
english translation text: Cause to flow, O Allah, through fear of You, tears of moaning from the corners of my eyes!

arabic text: وَأَدِّبِ ٱللَّهُمَّ نَزَقَ ٱلْخُرْقِ مِنِّي بِأَزِمَّةِ ٱلْقُنُوعِ
english translation text: Chastise, O Allah, the recklessness of my clumsiness with the reins of contentment!

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِن لَمْ تَبْتَدِئْنِي ٱلرَّحْمَةُ مِنْكَ بِحُسْنِ ٱلتَّوْفِيقِ
english translation text: My God, if mercy from You does not begin with fair success for me,

arabic text: فَمَنِ ٱلسَّاِلكُ بِي إِلَيْكَ فِي وَاضِحِ ٱلطَّرِيقِ
english translation text: then who can take me to You upon the evident path?

arabic text: وَإِنْ أَسْلَمَتْنِي أَنَاتُكَ لِقَائِدِ ٱلأَمَلِ وَٱلْمُنَىٰ
english translation text: If Your deliberateness should turn me over to the guide of hope and wishes,

arabic text: فَمَنِ ٱلْمُقِيلُ عَثَرَاتِي مِنْ كَبَوَاتِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ
english translation text: then who will annul my slips from the stumbles of caprice?

arabic text: وَإِنْ خَذَلَنِي نَصْرُكَ عِنْدَ مُحَارَبَةِ ٱلنَّفْسِ وَٱلشَّيْطَانِ
english translation text: If Your help should forsake me in the battle against the soul and Satan,

arabic text: فَقَدْ وَكَلَنِي خِذْلاَنُكَ إِلَىٰ حَيْثُ ٱلنَّصَبِ وَٱلْحِرْمَانِ
english translation text: then Your forsaking will have submitted me to where there is hardship and deprivation.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي أَتَرَانِي مَا أَتَيْتُكَ إِلاَّ مِنْ حَيْثُ ٱلآمَاِل
english translation text: My God, do You see that I have only come to You from the direction of hopes,

arabic text: أَمْ عَلِقْتُ بِأَطْرَافِ حِبَاِلكَ إِلاَّ حِينَ بَاعَدَتْنِي ذُنُوبِي عَنْ دَارِ ٱلْوِصَاِل
english translation text: or clung to the ends of Your cords when my sins have driven me from the house of union?

arabic text: فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَطِيَّةُ الَّتِي ٱمْتَطَتْ نَفْسِي مِنْ هَوَاهَا
english translation text: So what an evil mount upon which my soul has mounted-its caprice!

arabic text: فَوَاهاً لَهَا لِمَا سَوَّلَتْ لَهَا ظُنُونُهَا وَمُنَاهَا
english translation text: Woe upon it for being seduced by its own opinions and wishes!

arabic text: وَتَبّاً لَهَا لِجُرْأَتِهَا عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِهَا وَمَوْلاهَا
english translation text: Destruction be upon it for its audacity toward its Master and Protector!

arabic text: إِلٰهِي قَرَعْتُ بَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ بِيَدِ رَجَائِي
english translation text: My God, I have knocked upon the door of Your mercy with the hand of my hope,

arabic text: وَهَرَبْتُ إِلَيْكَ لاَجِئاً مِنْ فَرْطِ أَهْوَائِي
english translation text: fled to You seeking refuge from my excessive caprice,
and fixed the fingers of my love to the ends of Your cords.

arabic text: فَٱصْفَحِ اللَّهُمَّ عَمَّا كُنتُ أَجْرَمْتُهُ مِنْ زَلَلِي وَخَطَائِي
english translation text: So pardon, O Allah, the slips and errors I have committed,
and release me from the foot-tangling of my robe,
for You are my Master, my Protector, my Support and my Hope,

arabic text: وَأَنتَ غَايَةُ مَطْلُوبِي وَمُنَايَ فِي مُنْقَلَبِي وَمَثْوايَ
english translation text: and You are the object of my search and my desire in my ultimate end and stable abode.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي كَيْفَ تَطْرُدُ مِسْكِيناً ٱلْتَجَأَ إِلَيْكَ مِنَ ٱلذُّنُوبِ هَارِباً
english translation text: My God, how could You drive away a poor beggar who seeks refuge in You from sins, fleeing?

arabic text: أَم كَيْفَ تُخَيِّبُ مُستَرْشِداً قَصَدَ إِلَىٰ جَنَابِكَ سَاعِياً
english translation text: How could You disappoint one seeking guidance who repairs to Your threshold, running?

arabic text: أَمْ كَيْفَ تَرُدُّ ظَمْآناً وَرَدَ إِلَىٰ حِيَاضِكَ شَارِباً
english translation text: How could You reject a thirsty man who comes to Your pools to drink?

arabic text: كَلاَّ وَحِيَاضُكَ مُتْرَعَةٌ فِي ضَنْكِ ٱلْمُحُولِ
english translation text: Never! For Your pools are full in the hardship of drought,
Your door is open for seeking and penetration,
and You are the goal of requests and the object of hopes.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي هٰذِهِ أَزِمَّةُ نَفْسِي عَقَلْتُهَا بِعِقَاِل مَشِيئَتِكَ
english translation text: My God, these are the reins of my soul I have bounded with the ties of Your will.

arabic text: وَهٰذِهِ أَعْبَاءُ ذُنُوبِي دَرَاْتُهَا بِعَفْوِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ
english translation text: These are the burdens of my sins I have averted with Your pardon and mercy.

arabic text: وَهٰذِهِ أَهْوَائِيَ ٱلْمُضِلَّةُ وَكَلْتُهَا إِلَىٰ جَنَابِ لُطفِكَ وَرَاْفَتِكَ
english translation text: These are my misleading caprices I have referred to the threshold of Your gentleness and kindliness.

arabic text: فَٱجْعَلِ ٱللَّهُمَّ صَبَاحِي هٰذَا نَازِلاً عَلَيَّ بِضِيَاءِ ٱلْهُدَىٰ
english translation text: So, make this morning of mine, O Allah, descend upon me with the radiance of guidance
and safety in religion and this world!
And [make] my evening a shield against the deception of enemies
and a protection against the destructive blows of caprice!
Verily, You have power to do what You will!
You give the kingdom to whom You will,
seize the kingdom from whom You will,
exalt whom You will,
and abase whom You will.
In Your hand is the good
and You are powerful over all things.
You make the night to enter into the day,
make the day to enter into the night,
bring forth the living from the dead,
bring forth the dead from the living,
and provide whomsoever You will without measure!
There is no god but You!
Glory be to You, O Allah, and Yours is the praise!

arabic text: مَنْ ذَا يَعْرِفُ قَدْرَكَ فَلاَ يَخَافُكَ
english translation text: Who knows Your measure and yet does not fear You?

arabic text: وَمَن ذَا يَعْلَمُ مَا أَنتَ فَلاَ يَهَابُكَ
english translation text: Who knows what You are and yet does not stand in awe of You?
Through Your power, You have joined disparate things,
through Your gentleness, You have cleaved apart the daybreak,
through Your generosity, You have illumined the dark shrouds of night,

arabic text: وَأَنْهَرْتَ ٱلْمِيَاهَ مِنَ ٱلصُّمِّ ٱلصَّيَاخِيدِ عَذْباً وَأُجَاجاً
english translation text: made waters, sweet and salt, flow forth from hard shining stones,
sent dawn out of rain-clouds water cascading,

arabic text: وَجَعَلْتَ ٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ لِلْبَرِيَّةِ سِرَاجاً وَهَّاجاً
english translation text: and appointed the sun and the moon a blazing lamp for the creatures

arabic text: مِنْ غَيْرِ أَن تُمَارِسَ فِيمَا ٱبْتَدَأْتَ بِهِ لُغُوباً وَلاَ عِلاَجاً
english translation text: without experiencing in that which You originated either weariness or effort.
So, O He Who is alone in might and subsistence
and dominates His slaves with death and annihilation,
(please) bless Muhammad and his household, the god-fearing,
answer my supplication, hear my call,
and actualize through Your favor my hope and desire.

arabic text: يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ دُعِيَ لِكَشْفِ ٱلضُّرِّ
english translation text: O Best of those who are called to remove affliction
and object of hope in difficulty and ease!

arabic text: بِكَ أَنزَلْتُ حَاجَتِي فَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي مِنْ سَنِيِّ مَوَاهِبِكَ خَائِباً
english translation text: I have stated my need to You; so, do not reject me despairing of Your exalted gifts.

arabic text: يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ
english translation text: O All-generous! O All-generous! O All-generous!
By Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful!
May Allah bless the best of His creatures,
Muhammad, and his entire Household!
Prostrate and say (in Sajdah)
My God, my heart is veiled,
my soul is deficient,
my intelligence is defeated,
my caprice is triumphant,
my obedience is little,
my disobedience is much,
and my tongue confesses of sinning;
so, what am I to do?
O He Who covers defects!
O He Who knows the unseen!
O He Who removes troubles!
Forgive my sins, all of them,
in the name of the sacredness of Muhammad and the household of Muhammad!

arabic text: يَا غَفَّارُ يَا غَفَّارُ يَا غَفَّارُ
english translation text: O All-forgiver! O All-forgiver! O All-forgiver!
By Your mercy, O Most Merciful of the merciful!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
